fields.title: docs/qa: usage docs + manual test checklist
fields.description:
Write concise docs and a manual QA checklist for the extension.

Docs must cover:
- How to install project-locally (./.pi/extensions/skill-marker/)
- How to install globally (~/.pi/agent/extensions/)
- Examples: $beads, multiple skills, escaping
- Known limitations (context size, skill filtering vs --skills, etc.)

QA checklist DoD:
- Steps to verify autocomplete for $ / existing / commands / @ file refs
- Steps to verify injected message appears in context (by observing model behavior or logs)
- Error handling checks (missing skill, unreadable SKILL.md)
fields.close_reason: Docs and manual QA checklist added to extension README
